name: Prof. Dr. Mohammad Jamal Abu Nasser
designation: General, Laparoscopic, Breast, Hernia, Colo-rectal and LASER Proctology
specialty: General, LASER Proctology & Advanced Laparoscopic Surgeon
biography:
Mohammad Dr. Jamal Abu Nasser completed his Graduation (MBBS) from Dinajpur Medical College in the year 2000. He has extensively trained himself for Post graduation in General Surgery under Renowned professors of Dhaka Medical College Hospital. From 2006 to 2012, he was posted as Registrar, Resident Surgeon (RS) of General Surgery in different well reputed institutions including Shahabuddin Medical College, International Medical College and Northern International Medical College.


He achieved his fellowship (FCPS) in General Surgery from Bangladesh College of Physician and Surgeon (BCPS) in the year 2013. After completion of his fellowship, he worked as Assistant Professor and acting Head of the department of Surgery in Monno Medical College from 2013 to 2016. Thereafter he was promoted & worked as Associate Professor and head of the department of Surgery in Ashian Medical College from 2016 to 2017. He also worked as Associate Professor in the department of Surgery of Shahabuddin Medical College from 2017 to 2020. Then he joined as Associate professor in the department of surgery of Ashiyan Medical College in 2020 and was promoted there as Professor (C.C) on 11.02.202.

Now he is working as Professor of surgery at Enam Medical Collage & hospital which is one of the top class Medical College in Bangladesh


He also worked as Vice Principal (In-charge) in Ashiyan Medical College from 2020 to 2022. During the course of a successful career spanning over 25 years, he has attended many scientific seminars, conferences in Bangladesh and abroad to update his knowledge in the field of General & Laparoscopic Surgery to provide the latest treatment to his patients. To enrich his surgical hand, he participated in many workshops in laparoscopic surgery in Bangladesh including Robotic surgery in India.


He earned Fellowship in Minimal Access Surgery (Laparoscopic surgery) FMAS, of Association of Minimal Access Surgeons of India (AMASI) in 2017. He has got training in LASER Proctology (treatment of haemorrhoid, anal fissure, pilonidal sinus and fistula in ano through LASER from India. His mentor was world famous LASER Proctology surgeon Prof. Dr. Kalyan kour at AMRI hospital, Kolkata, India in 2019.
He is an excellent general, laparoscopic and LASER Proctology surgeon and has performed every type of surgical procedure meticulously and confidently. Dr. Nasser is proficient in performing Gastrointestinal surgeries including Colorectal surgeries, Hepatobiliary surgeries, Hernia surgeries by both open and laparoscopic methods. Moreover he has got special expertise in performing Breast surgeries and all kinds of Ano-rectal surgeries including Longo operation (Stapled Haemorrhoidectomy) and STARR (Stapled Transanal Rectal Resection).


He is a LASER Proctology Surgeon who performed Anal Fissure, Hemorrhoid, Fistula in Ano and Pilonidal sinus operation with LASER. He is an excellent teacher for undergraduate students and has experience of teaching for 19 long years. He has been playing an important role in some academic activities of Bangladesh College of Physicians and Surgeons (BCPS) for postgraduate medical students. Dr. Nasser is a life member of SOSB (Society of Surgeon of Bangladesh) and SELSB (Society of Endo-Laparoscopic Surgeon of Bangladesh). He has contributed to no less than 16 scientific publications in journals of various distinguished Medical Colleges of Bangladesh.
meta_description: AMZ Hospital Ltd, Prof. Dr. Mohammad Jamal Abu Nasser, General, Laparoscopy

name: Dr. Abeda Khatun
designation: Senior Consultant Obstetrician & Gynaecologist. Laparoscopic Surgeon
biography:
Dr. Abeda Khatun graduated from Rajshahi Medical College in 1975. She had a long career in the field of Obstetrics and Gynaecology. She started her career in Obs & Gynae in 1977 at Holy Family Hospital, Dhaka, and completed a Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology (DGO) in 1983 from Riyadh Maternity and Children's Hospital, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The DGO course was organized by the Ministry of Health, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, jointly with the University of London, UK. After completing the DGO, she worked at the Maternity and Children's Hospital, one of the largest tertiary care centers in Saudi Arabia, with an average of 24,000 deliveries per annum. She was posted at King Khaled Hospital in 1985, Al Kharj, and worked until 1989. It was a newly built 200-bed general hospital with 50 beds in the Obs & Gynae department. In 1989, she joined Al Yamamah Maternity and Children's Hospital, a 300-bed hospital with a very busy Obs & Gynae unit, attaining an average of 15,000 deliveries per annum.

In 1997, she moved to the United Kingdom and joined Whipps Cross Hospital, London. In 2003, she passed the MRCOG (UK) and returned to Riyadh, joining Al Obeid Specialized Hospital, Riyadh, working as a senior Consultant Obstetrician and Gynaecologist until 2021. She secured FRCOG in 2014 and FACOG in the same year. During her career, she has gained expertise and specialized training in the following fields of Obs & Gynae:

  • ✔ IVF-ET with assisted fertility at King Faisal Specialist Hospital and Research Center, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
  • ✔ Gynaecological and Obstetrical Ultrasound at Maternity and Children's Hospital, Riyadh, KSA.
  • ✔ Advanced Laparoscopic surgery, Level-IV in animals, King Fahad National Guard Hospital, Riyadh, KSA.
  • ✔ Laparoscopy & Hysteroscopy Workshop, Military Hospital, Riyadh, KSA.
  • ✔ Colposcopy & Cytology Workshop, King Fahad Medical City, KSA.
  •  

She is highly experienced in all types of Obstetrics and Gynaecological surgery, especially Laparoscopic gynaecological interventions. Dr. Abeda attended many Obs. & Gynae seminars, and she has many publications in journals of Obs & Gynaecology.
meta_description: AMZ Hospital Ltd, Dr. Abeda Khatun, Gynecologist and obstetrician

name: Assistant Prof. Dr. Md. Asaduzzaman
designation: Associate Professor and Head of Orthopedic Department
biography:
Dr. Md. Ashaduzzaman obtained his MBBS from Holy Family Red Crescent Medical College under Dhaka University. He also obtained D-ortho post graduation degree from BSMMU in 2019.

He has completed his post graduation training from DMCH, DJMCH & BSMMU. Also done short courses like CCD from BIRDEM hospital and AO Basic Trauma course from AO foundation.

He has been in Ad-din Women’s Medical College for 2 years from December, 2019 as Assistant Professor, Orthopaedics department. 

He has participated in the ‘MASTER COURSE ON TRAUMA & SPINE SURGERY‘ held on June 2022 in Chennai.

Alongside his professional responsibilities Dr. Md. Asaduzzaman is closely involved with social activities. He is a Member of Bangladesh Orthopaedic Society.

He was born in Manikganj and studied at Dhaka Residential Model College. He is married and blessed with two daughters.

name: Prof. Dr. Saeedur Rahman
biography:
As a Specialist Physician in Pediatrics and Neonatology he has gained a diversified experience and cross-functional expertise by working and living in 3 different countries: Bangladesh, Iran & Saudi Arabia. He wants to serve the pediatric age group of patients sincerely and wholeheartedly with devotion with his knowledge and skills that he acquired in the last 39 years in the field of pediatrics, both at home and abroad.

Prof. Dr. Saeedur Rahman completed his graduation (MBBS) from Dhaka Medical College in the year 1980.

Thereafter he has served as Health Cadre, Bangladesh Civil Service from year 1981 till year 1990, he was a lecturer of Pathology at Sylhet Medical College and Hospital for a year.

He achieved his FCPS from Bangladesh College of Physicians & Surgeons in the year 1989.

From year 1990 till year 1991 he was a Senior Registrar, Pediatrics at Dhaka Shishu (Children) Hospital.

In the year 1991 he joined Ministry of Health, Islamic Republic of Iran as a Pediatric Specialist and served in three different district hospitals till year 1993. 

He has also worked as a Professor, Pediatric Consultant & Head of the Department of Pediatrics at Jahurul Islam Medical College & Hospital for 13 long years from 1994 till 2007.

Then he joined United Hospital Ltd. as a Pediatric Consultant and worked there from year 2007 till year 2008.

Then he joined Al-Qunfudah General Hospital as a Pediatric Specialist in Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and worked from year 2008 till year 2018.

Upon his return from Kingdom of Saudi Arabia he joined as a Senior Consultant, Pediatrics at BRB Hospital Limited and served there from year 2018 till year 2021.

Currently he has joined AMZ Hospital Limited as Senior Consultant, Pediatric from year 2021 and ever since he has been treating patients delicately.
meta_description: AMZ Hospital Ltd, Prof. Dr. Saeedur Rahman, Pediatric specialist

name: Asst. Prof. Dr. Md. Abdul Maleque Molla
institute: Imam Mohamman Ibn Saoud Islamic University
biography:
Dr Mohammed Abdul Maleque Molla was graduated from Rajshahi Medical College in 1975. He started his carrier in Paediatrics in 1985 after completion of Diploma in Paeditrics and Child health (DCH). He joined department of Paediatrics in King Khaled hospital, Al Kharj in 1985.  It was a newly build 200 bed general hospital where he organized a Neonatal ICU. In 1989 he joined Al Yamamah Maternity and Children Hospital, a 300 bedded hospital with 100 bedded Neonatology unit and 40 bedded General Paediatrics department including 7 bedded Pediatric Intensive care unit. In 1996 he moves to United Kingdom and joined, Royal Hospital for Sick Children, York Hill, Glasgow.

In 1997 he passed the MRCP(UK) and return back to Riyadh and joined Al Yamamamh Hospital. He was posted as Consultant Neonatologist and worked until 2001 when he was posted in  Paediatric Intensive care Unit as Consultant Paediatic Intensivist until December 2021. Besides his job he had special interest in Pediatric Pulmonology. He was organizing Pediatric Pulmonology and Asthma Clinics in Yamamah Hospital since 1997 until 2019. He also took training in Bronchoscopy from King Faisal Hospital, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

He was trained in paediatrics and neonatal Intensive care medicine in various hospital specially in UK and Saudi Arabia. Al Yamamah Hospital is one of the largest Maternity and Children Hospital in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Intensive care units are equipped with most advance and modern equipment’s. It is a referral center and was accepting patients from all over the Kingdom.

Al Yamamah hospital is one of the educational centers in Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and running Saudi board training programs in Paediatrics, Obs and Gynae and Dentistry. There is Fellowship program in Neonatology, jointly with King Fahad Medical City, Riyadh. For Undergraduate teaching program, three Universities (Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University, Al Marefa University, Dar Al Uloom University) in Riyadh, are affiliated with Al Yamamah Hospital for theritical and practical training for their students.

Dr. Molla was teacher for post graduate Saudi Board students in Al Yamamah Hospital and teaching the undergraduate student from three universities. He was given post of assistant Professor of Pediatrics from Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University and Al Marefa University, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.  He was examiner in Saudi Commission For Health Specialties for Saudi Board and Arab Board programs.  He was organizing postgraduate courses for MRCPCH and Saudi Paediatrics board programs  was organizer of many seminars and Paediatrics & Neonatal club meetings in Yamamah hospital. He published many scientific papers in reputed medical Journals.
meta_description: AMZ Hospital Ltd, Asst. Prof. Dr. Md. Abdul Maleque Molla, Pediatric Specialist

name: Professor Dr. Samidur Rahman
qualification: MBBS, MS , Special in Hypospadias Surgery
biography:
Professor Dr. Samidur Rahman is an established and highly skilled pediatric surgeon with over 22 years’ experience in the field of Pediatric Surgery. He is well regarded in pediatric surgical society, earning many recognitions and fame for his enthusiastic patient care and surgical qualities. Due to his keen and enthusiastic interest on Hypospadias surgery and consistent devoted work on this fine but difficult topic by this time he is well known Hypospadias surgeon in surgical society as well as all over the country.  

Dr. Samidur was born in Meherpur and graduated (MBBS) from Sylhet MAG Osmani Medical College on 1991. He stood 2nd in final professional examination under Chittagong university for which he was awarded “Rear Admiral Mahbubur Rahman Memorial Gold Medal”. He trained in pediatric surgery at Dhaka Shishu Hospital under Dhaka university and successfully completed MS (Pediatrics) degree in 2000.

Dr. Samidur has been practicing as consultant Pediatric Surgeon since 2000 in different Medical Colleges in Bangladesh, of which last 12 years was in Sir Salimullah Medical College, Dhaka before joining in Dhaka Medical College and Hospital , the biggest academic hospital in the country. Now he is working as Professor of pediatric surgery and Head of unit IV in the Department of Pediatric Surgery, DMC&H. He has keen interest in Hypospadias and Neonatal surgery and attended in many seminars and live workshops in home and abroad specially conducted by legendary hypospadias Surgeons Prof. Snod Grass( USA) and Prof. Hadidi(Germany).

Dr. Samidur is a life member of Association of Pediatric Surgeons of Bangladesh(APSB) and Society of Surgeons of Bangladesh(SOSB).In addition, he obtained many certificates in different training programs, seminars, symposiums and workshops in the field of Pediatric Surgery including Pediatric laparospic Surgery. Now he is working as senior consultant pediatric surgeon,  Director and chief  surgeon at AMZ Hypospadias Center in AMZ  hospital, Uttar Badda Dhaka.
meta_description: AMZ Hospital Ltd, Professor Dr. Samidur Rahman, Pediatric Surgeon

name: Professor Dr. Mohammad Nashir Uddin
institute: National Institute of Burn and Plastic Surgery
biography: Dr. Mohammad Nashir Uddin, Currently working as Professor & Director (Plastic Surgery) in Burn and Plastic Surgery Department of National Institute of Burn and Plastic Surgery. In 1997, he joined government service through BCS 17th Batch. In his long surgical career of 25 years since 1999, he served with distinction as Assistant Registrar, Registrar, Resident Surgeon, Junior Consultant, Assistant Professor and Associate Professor at Dhaka Medical College Hospital, Mitford Hospital, Faridpur Medical College Hospital, Suhrawardy Hospital and National Heart Institute. He obtained FCPS in Surgery in 2003 and MS in Plastic Surgery in 2012. In 2019, he was awarded the FACS degree by the American College of Surgeons and later FRCS from Royal College of Physicians & Surgeons, Glasgow, UK for his outstanding contributions to surgery. He also received advanced training in plastic surgery from Australia, Germany, Singapore, Turkey, Thailand and India. He attended and presented research papers in numerous scientific conferences at home and abroad. His numerous research articles have been published in various journals at home and abroad. Besides, he advises patients on various problems of burn and plastic surgery regularly on national television. Since the inception of AMZ Hospital, he has been serving patients in this institution as Chief Consultant in Burn, Plastic & Cosmetic Surgery.

name: Prof. Dr. A.K.M Musa Bhuiyan Bablu
biography:
Dr. A K M Musa Bhuiyan Bablu passed MBBS from Sylhet MAG Osmani Medical College in 1995 and joined government service in 2001 through 20th BCS. Later he obtained MS degree in Urology from Dhaka Medical College under Dhaka University. During his professional life, he received various advanced trainings in surgery and urology at home and abroad. Currently, he is working as an associate professor in Dhaka Medical College and Hospital.

The services of urology and surgery are Dr. Masha Bhuiyan gives with great experience and care:

·         You can consult modern treatments for kidney, ureter, urinary bladder, prostate, urinary tract, male reproductive system and sexual problems.

·         Kidney and renal duct stones, urinary bladder tumors and stones, prostate enlargement, any problem of urinary tract are operated with the help of machines without cutting the abdomen.

·         Modern treatment and operation of any urological cancer including kidney tumor, cancer.

·         Any urinary problems, such as: frequent urination, blood, pus, dribbling, frequent urination at night, slow urination, urinary infection.

·         Any sexual problems of men, penis and testicles problems.

·         Waist-middle pain, body swelling, watery hands and feet, kidney failure / failure, kidney water or kidney swelling.

·         Urinary discharge/incontinence in women, loss of clothes due to straining urine, discharge of urine with sneezing, bedwetting at night.

·         Urinary problems in children especially night or day bedwetting, any congenital or traumatic problems of urinary tract and testicles.

·         Congenital defects of hypospadias, epispadias and testicles in children

·         Hernia, hydrocele and other operations

·         Do painless circumcise

·         He has also worked as a Professor, Pediatric Consultant & Head of the Department of Pediatrics at Jahurul Islam Medical College & Hospital for 13 long years from 1994 till 2007.

Then he joined United Hospital Ltd. as a Pediatric Consultant and worked there from year 2007 till year 2008.

Then he joined Al-Qunfudah General Hospital as a Pediatric Specialist in Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and worked from year 2008 till year 2018.

Upon his return from Kingdom of Saudi Arabia he joined as a Senior Consultant, Pediatrics at BRB Hospital Limited and served there from year 2018 till year 2021.

Currently he has joined AMZ Hospital Limited as Senior Consultant, Pediatric from year 2021 and ever since he has been treating patients delicately.
